en.text: or (shortened); ; or ; feminine (irregular) sometimes ; plural masculine ; feminine ; or lemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel, corrected to אַתֵּנָה; or ; a primitive pronoun of the second person; thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
